'''shashuwu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:xylochemistry|xylochemistry]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-sh-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:xylochemistry|xylochemistry]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| shashuwu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shæshiwith|shæshiwith]] || [[word:shæshiwij|shæshiwij]] || [[word:shæshiwish|shæshiwish]] || [[word:shæshiwi|shæshiwi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:shashushuwuth|shashushuwuth]] || [[word:shashushuwuj|shashushuwuj]] || [[word:shashushuwush|shashushuwush]] || [[word:shashushuwu|shashushuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:shashuwuth|shashuwuth]] || [[word:shashuwuj|shashuwuj]] || [[word:shashuwush|shashuwush]] || [[word:shashuwu|shashuwu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:shashufwuth|shashufwuth]] || [[word:shashufwuj|shashufwuj]] || [[word:shashufwush|shashufwush]] || [[word:shashufwuf|shashufwuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:shashuwuthu|shashuwuthu]] || [[word:shashuwuju|shashuwuju]] || [[word:shashuwushu|shashuwushu]] || [[word:shashuwuku|shashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:shashuwuth|shashuwuth]] || [[word:shashuwuj|shashuwuj]] || [[word:shashuwush|shashuwush]] || [[word:shashuwu|shashuwu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:shashuwuthul|shashuwuthul]] || [[word:shashuwujul|shashuwujul]] || [[word:shashuwushul|shashuwushul]] || [[word:shashuwukul|shashuwukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:shashuwuthuthu|shashuwuthuthu]] || [[word:shashuwujuju|shashuwujuju]] || [[word:shashuwushushu|shashuwushushu]] || [[word:shashuwuku|shashuwuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:shashuwuthun|shashuwuthun]] || [[word:shashuwujun|shashuwujun]] || [[word:shashuwushun|shashuwushun]] || [[word:shashuwukun|shashuwukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:shashuwuthuoro|shashuwuthuoro]] || [[word:shashuwujuoro|shashuwujuoro]] || [[word:shashuwushuoro|shashuwushuoro]] || [[word:shashuwukuoro|shashuwukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
